use_cases: Landing page hero sections with immersive animated shader backgrounds
Visual entry points for SaaS and product websites requiring high-impact visuals
Interactive hero components with mouse-reactive WebGL shader effects
Modern web application hero sections with hardware-accelerated rendering
Brand showcase pages needing dynamic, eye-catching animated backgrounds
ai_summary: An animated WebGL shader hero component featuring dynamic gradient effects and pointer tracking. The component uses WebGL2 for hardware-accelerated rendering and creates interactive visual effects that respond to mouse movement. Includes customizable trust badges, headlines, subtitles, and CTA buttons overlaid on the animated shader background.
